name: Draw Result
description: Balanced post for a drawn match. Reflects a shared result while highlighting positives from the performance.

subheadline.example: A hard-fought point at Main Venue

guidelines: Use a match action photo. The tone should be neutral and balanced — highlight the effort and any comeback moments. If Demo Brand came from behind, the messaging can be slightly more positive. Avoid overly negative language. Score display should be symmetrical.
